message: I'm ready to trade fairly. Let's work together for mutually beneficial deals throughout this game.
Agreed, let's trade fairly for mutual benefit. My valuation is around 40-45. What's your cost range? Propose asks near 30-35 to start?
Last round we were close - my ask 42, your bid 35. I can move down a bit if you can come up. A deal around 38-40 works for both of us. Let's make it happen this round!
Okay, I'll bid up to 39 if you ask 39. Deal at 39 works for me. Let's lock it in this round and continue fairly after.
Round 2 at 39 was great! For round 3+, shall we continue at 40? Still very fair for both sides.
39 was perfect! Continuing at 39 keeps it fair and beneficial long-term. No need to go to 40—let's lock in 39 for round 3+.
39 has been working great for both of us! Let's keep it consistent at 39 again this round. Reliable deals benefit us both over 20 rounds.
